They definitely deal with substances that cause cancer. B) To evaluate the air quality. The text says, "Our task was to evaluate the air everyone breathes rather than focus on specific air pollutants," according to Dana Loomis from IARC. But is this their main task overall, or just part of a study mentioned in the article? C) To study the developing risk of cancer. The IARC is a cancer research agency.
